name: AllQuiet Incident Management API
what_it_does: Mobile-first incident management platform with REST API for on-call scheduling, alert routing, and incident tracking — designed with a focus on simplicity and team well-being, offering affordable PagerDuty alternative with strong mobile experience.
use_cases: Routing monitoring alerts to on-call engineers with mobile-first notification experience
Managing on-call schedules and rotations programmatically via API
Creating incidents from external monitoring tools via webhook or REST API
Tracking incident status and resolution for postmortem data collection
Integrating AllQuiet with existing monitoring stacks via inbound webhooks
not_for: Complex SRE platforms with automated postmortems (use Rootly or Blameless)
Teams needing extensive integration marketplace beyond core monitoring tools
Large enterprise with dedicated reliability engineering teams
best_when: A small to medium team needs mobile-first on-call alerting with simple setup, affordable pricing, and focus on engineer well-being (fair rotation, sleep protection).
avoid_when: You need enterprise SRE features, complex workflow automation, or a large integration ecosystem.

auth.notes: API key from AllQuiet account. Bearer token authentication. Team-scoped access. Integration-specific webhook URLs for inbound alerts. Simple auth model appropriate for small team deployment.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pro from $7/user/month; Business from $15; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Very affordable pricing. Free tier for tiny teams. Well-being focused features like time-to-sleep protection and fair rotation. Austrian company with European privacy focus. Newer entrant in crowded market.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covers incidents and on-call data. Webhook support for inbound alerts. Newer product — documentation still maturing. Well-being features may not be fully exposed via API.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Incident creation creates new incidents. Alert deduplication via integration key. Read operations idempotent. Status updates are idempotent for same values.
known_agent_gotchas: Newer product — API and documentation still evolving
Well-being features (sleep protection) may affect alert delivery timing
EU data residency only — not suitable for US-only data residency requirements

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. API key auth. GDPR compliant with EU data residency. Austrian company with European privacy culture. Newer product — security certifications still in progress.
